div.p: Constraint: Select the smallest set of tokens $V^{(p)} \subset V$ such that: $\sum_{x \in V^{(p)}} P(x) \geq p$

g.text: Token ID | P(x) | Cumulative P | Action
Threshold p=0.90 cut-off reached at index 3

g.title: Zero out logits for indices where cumulative sum exceeds p

g.text: P_final = P_i / Σ_{j in V(p)} P_j
